title: Magru Electrical - we keep you powered!
description: BUSINESS NEWS - At Magru Electrical we pride...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - At Magru Electrical we pride ourselves on our honesty and integrity.

Having been nominated for the Best of George three times within our first six years, was a huge honour.


> Having now received the award as the best electrician in George is nothing other than a huge privilege.


We thank each and all for your support and remain grateful to our Heavenly Father for blessing us abundantly.

After nine years of learning from George legend, Sampie Bezuidenhout, Grumpy and Anton founded Magru Electrical in 2019.

But we are nothing without our qualified, hard-working and loyal team, including our valued admin ladies.

At Magru Electrical we pride ourselves on our honesty and integrity. We deliver clean, efficient, specialised, and - most important of all - legal work.

We issue certificates of compliance (CoCs).


> We are also specialists in fault-finding, maintenance, new buildings (construction), inverters and solar, and renovations in singleand three-phase electricity.


No job is too small - we do both residential and industrial work, always striving for excellence and delivering value for money!

Again, we thank all our clients for your continued support.

If the phone doesn't ring, we don't have work, so we are grateful for everyone putting their trust in us. What a beautiful place we live in. Thank you, George!

Grumpy and Anton say they are nothing without their brilliant team.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
